title: Smoky Quesadilla
description: A smoky twist on a classic quesadilla, inspired by Portuguese flavors. Charred vegetables add a depth of flavor to this savory dish.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat.
Place one tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle shredded cheese on half of the tortilla.
Add charred bell peppers and onions on top of the cheese.
Sprinkle smoked paprika over the vegetables.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Cut the quesadilla into wedges and serve hot.
